name: Refactor module while keeping all tests passing
prompt:
The TaskManager class in src/task_manager.py works but uses a flat list with linear search for everything. Refactor it to:
1. Use a dictionary (keyed by task id) for O(1) lookups instead of linear search
2. Use a dataclass or named tuple for Task instead of raw dicts
3. Keep the same public API — all methods must have the same signatures and return the same data structures (dicts with id/title/priority/done keys)

The tests in tests/test_task_manager.py must pass after your refactoring. Do NOT modify the test file.
